attestation.statement: Clinician reviewed and attests the must-not-miss (Axis B) rule-out templates present for low back pain and headache: the differentials (cauda equina, malignancy, vertebral fracture, spinal infection, AAA; SAH, meningitis/encephalitis, giant cell arteritis, raised ICP) and their discriminators are clinically valid for Trunk 5.0 use. Clinical sign-off only; coverage limited to the presentations present (expansion separate); regulatory sign-off not provided here.
attestation.scope: the 2 records in this file (axis-b-templates, dev v0.1.0)
